---
title: "2025 Football Analytics Conference"
date: '2025-12-12'
image: image.png
description: "Jess and Rich attended the Football Analytics Conference"
editor: 'source'
---

## 2025 Football Analytics Conference

In December 2025, Jess and Rich from the QSAY group attended the 2nd Football Analytics Conference at Oldham Athletic Football Club. Jess served on a panel at the end of first day discussing the state of modern football analytics. More information on the conference can be found [here](https://www.oldhamathletic.co.uk/news/2025/december/12/football-/).

![](image.png "2025 FAC")
